# CyberDucks

## Description

![CyberDuck.jpg](/files/0ed0a5fc14116f3489be5cf824f4702f/CyberDuck.jpg)



---

The CyberDuckOrganizaion (CDO) was almost erradicated last year. But looks like some of its messages are still scatered around the web. Can you find it?

┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/Downloads]
└─$ strings -n 16 CyberDuck.jpg
